name: send_app_control_without_appid
description: Launch or query applications using implicit intent (operation, URI, MIME type) when you do NOT know the specific app_id. The system will find the best matching app automatically. Use 'query' action to discover which apps can handle a given intent.

operation.description: The operation to perform. Common values: 'http://tizen.org/appcontrol/operation/view' (view content), 'http://tizen.org/appcontrol/operation/call' (make call), 'http://tizen.org/appcontrol/operation/share' (share content), 'http://tizen.org/appcontrol/operation/pick' (pick content)

action.description: 'launch' to execute the intent, 'query' to list matching apps (default: 'launch')

extra_data.description: Optional key-value pairs to pass as extra data
